demoSaves.early.name: Early Ludus
demoSaves.early.description: A small early-game ludus with all core buildings at level 1 and three beginner gladiators.
demoSaves.mid.name: Mid Ludus
demoSaves.mid.description: A mid-game ludus with buildings around level 3 or 4 and four experienced gladiators.
demoSaves.advanced.name: Advanced Ludus
demoSaves.advanced.description: An advanced ludus with level 6 buildings and six gladiators on Saturday planning, just before the Sunday arena phase.

buildings.domus.description: The administrative heart of the ludus.
buildings.canteen.name: Canteen
buildings.canteen.description: A food building awaiting its redesigned role.
buildings.dormitory.name: Dormitory
buildings.dormitory.description: Provides quarters and supports ludus happiness.
buildings.trainingGround.name: Training Ground
buildings.trainingGround.description: Improves combat stats at a fatigue cost.
buildings.confirmPurchase.title: Confirm purchase
buildings.confirmUpgrade.title: Confirm upgrade
buildings.validation.insufficientTreasur: Treasury is too low for this cost.
buildings.validation.missingBuildingLeve: This building must reach level {level} first.
buildings.validation.notPurchased: Purchase this building before upgrading it.
buildings.validation.unavailableImprovem: This improvement is not available here.
buildings.validation.unavailableLevel: No higher level is available yet.
buildings.validation.unavailablePolicy: This policy is not available here.
buildings.validation.unavailableSkill: This skill is not available here.
ludusCapacity.title: Ludus capacity
buildingPanel.skillNoUnlockedActivities: No activity unlocked by this skill.
buildingPanel.staffShortageWarning: Only {current}/{required} required staff assigned. This building currently works at {efficiency}% efficiency.
buildingPanel.confirmSkillPurchase.title: Confirm skill
buildingPanel.noAssignedStaff: No staff is currently assigned to this building.
buildingPanel.noBuildingIncome: No gain recorded for this building yet.
buildingPanel.noBuildingExpenses: No cost recorded for this building yet.
buildingPanel.noSkillActivities: No skill activities are available here.
buildingPanel.noSkills: No building skills are available here.
buildingPanel.noPolicies: No weekly policy is available here.
buildingPanel.noBuildingLedger: No ledger entry for this building yet.
buildingSkills.domus.ledger-room.descrip: Keeps household accounts tight enough to shave routine ludus expenses.
buildingSkills.domus.contract-shelf.desc: Organizes standard deals so the school earns more from regular patrons.
buildingSkills.domus.staff-registry.desc: Tracks workers and duties, raising staff efficiency across the estate.
buildingSkills.domus.treasury-lockbox.de: Protects coin reserves and gives the lanista steadier reputation in town.
buildingSkills.domus.reception-atrium.de: Controls visits and petitions before they turn into unrest.
buildingSkills.domus.steward-desk.descri: Centralizes daily approvals to cut waste from maintenance spending.
buildingSkills.domus.tax-planning.descri: Prepares civic accounts in advance, improving net income each week.
buildingSkills.domus.loan-contacts.descr: Maintains discreet creditors who help the staff act faster under pressure.
buildingSkills.domus.weekly-board.descri: Turns weekly priorities into visible orders that impress local partners.
buildingSkills.domus.patron-letters.desc: Keeps patrons flattered and slaves calmer through steady correspondence.
Spots hidden losses before market day and lowers recurring expenses.
buildingSkills.domus.legal-favors.descri: Calls in friendly magistrates to improve contract revenue.
buildingSkills.domus.recruitment-files.d: Preserves useful records so staff assignments produce more output.
buildingSkills.domus.public-seal.descrip: Adds official weight to the house name and strengthens reputation gains.
buildingSkills.domus.debt-refinancing.de: Renegotiates dangerous obligations before they feed rebellion.
buildingSkills.domus.political-network.d: Uses civic friendships to secure privileged rates and lower costs.
buildingSkills.domus.grand-strategy.desc: Aligns the whole ludus around stronger commercial goals.
buildingSkills.domus.crisis-council.desc: Gathers senior staff quickly when failures threaten the estate.
Wins provincial recognition that makes the ludus name travel farther.
buildingSkills.domus.legacy-house.descri: Turns house tradition into loyalty that dampens rebellion pressure.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.wooden-pal: Adds sturdy practice posts for safer strength drills.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.footwork-l: Marks the sand for repeated agility exercises.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.basic-dril: Standardizes beginner routines that build defensive habits.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.endurance-: Paces conditioning work to reduce avoidable training injuries.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.pair-sparr: Pairs fighters in controlled bouts that earn the school more reputation.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.weapon-rot: Cycles weapons through drills so planned fighters gain strength faster.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.shield-dis: Forces careful shield work and improves agility under load.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.injury-awa: Teaches fighters to read danger and improve defensive progress.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.veteran-de: Lets experienced gladiators show safer techniques to the whole roster.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.noble-trai: Packages refined lessons for nobles and raises the ludus profile.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.tactical-s: Runs set-piece bouts that sharpen strength under pressure.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.class-spec: Separates fighters by style so agility work lands better.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.fatigue-co: Schedules rest inside drills to strengthen defense without overtraining.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.arena-simu: Recreates arena stress while keeping injury risk under control.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.soldier-tr: Turns disciplined drills into paid military preparation and reputation.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.elite-cond: Pushes top fighters through focused strength cycles.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.champion-m: Spreads champion footwork patterns through planned training.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.brutal-eff: Hardens defensive reactions through relentless but measured routines.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.master-tra: Makes safety doctrine part of every advanced session.
buildingSkills.trainingGround.public-dri: Opens polished exercises to spectators and grows public reputation.
buildingSkills.canteen.grain-stores.desc: Secures staple rations that keep the ludus happier.
buildingSkills.canteen.clean-water.descr: Improves drinking water and supports planned fighters' health.
buildingSkills.canteen.soup-rotation.des: Varies cheap meals enough to make the kitchen more profitable.
buildingSkills.canteen.basic-hygiene.des: Keeps food areas clean and improves daily production.
buildingSkills.canteen.cook-assignment.d: Assigns cooks by shift so meals lift fighter morale.
buildingSkills.canteen.protein-meals.des: Adds richer meals that raise general happiness.
buildingSkills.canteen.herbal-broths.des: Serves restorative broths for healthier planned training.
buildingSkills.canteen.waste-control.des: Cuts spoiled food and squeezes more income from supplies.
buildingSkills.canteen.feast-day.descrip: Schedules shared meals that make kitchen work more productive.
buildingSkills.canteen.ration-ledger.des: Tracks portions fairly and keeps morale from slipping.
Tunes meals around training days to raise happiness.
buildingSkills.canteen.recovery-meals.de: Feeds injured or exhausted fighters for stronger health recovery.
buildingSkills.canteen.morale-banquets.d: Uses occasional banquets to turn surplus food into revenue.
buildingSkills.canteen.disease-preventio: Separates risky ingredients before sickness slows production.
Sells excess stores through reliable contracts while lifting morale.
buildingSkills.canteen.champion-diet.des: Gives stars tailored meals that inspire the whole ludus.
buildingSkills.canteen.luxury-imports.de: Imports prized ingredients that improve planned fighters' health.
buildingSkills.canteen.emergency-reserve: Keeps backup food stocks that can be sold when prices spike.
buildingSkills.canteen.festival-catering: Turns kitchen output into festival service and stronger production.
buildingSkills.canteen.nutritional-doctr: Makes diet planning a school doctrine that sustains morale.
buildingSkills.dormitory.straw-bedding.d: Adds basic bedding so planned fighters recover more energy.
buildingSkills.dormitory.clean-mats.desc: Keeps sleeping mats fresh and raises fighter morale.
buildingSkills.dormitory.quiet-rules.des: Sets quiet rules that reduce arguments and rebellion pressure.
buildingSkills.dormitory.night-lamps.des: Lights the quarters safely and protects resting fighters' health.
buildingSkills.dormitory.shared-quarters: Groups fighters into stable rooms that improve ludus happiness.
buildingSkills.dormitory.wooden-beds.des: Replaces rough bedding with beds for better energy recovery.
buildingSkills.dormitory.noise-screens.d: Screens noisy areas so planned fighters keep steadier morale.
buildingSkills.dormitory.personal-chests: Gives fighters secure storage and reduces theft-driven unrest.
buildingSkills.dormitory.injury-rest-are: Sets aside quiet space for healthier recovery.
buildingSkills.dormitory.mood-rules.desc: Creates routines that lift daily happiness in the quarters.
buildingSkills.dormitory.veteran-wing.de: Lets veterans rest properly and return with more energy.
buildingSkills.dormitory.champion-room.d: Honors top fighters and raises morale among planned gladiators.
buildingSkills.dormitory.conflict-mediat: Intervenes in room disputes before rebellion spreads.
buildingSkills.dormitory.heat-management: Improves airflow and shade to protect health during rest.
buildingSkills.dormitory.loyalty-rituals: Builds shared identity that makes the ludus feel happier.
buildingSkills.dormitory.private-cells.d: Adds controlled privacy for fighters who need deeper recovery.
buildingSkills.dormitory.brotherhood-oat: Turns shared vows into stronger morale during planned work.
buildingSkills.dormitory.rest-discipline: Enforces sleep schedules that keep unrest contained.
Prepares emergency quarters that preserve health during shocks.
buildingSkills.dormitory.honor-hall.desc: Displays house honors where every fighter rests, lifting happiness.
buildingActivities.trainingGround.nobleT: Turns contract points into noble lessons and extra prestige.
buildingActivities.trainingGround.soldie: Uses contract points to drill soldiers for coin and reputation.
buildingActivities.trainingGround.public: Turns event points into paid public training displays.
buildingActivities.canteen.supplyContrac: Uses production points to sell surplus food contracts.
buildingActivities.canteen.festivalCater: Uses event points to cater local gatherings for coin and reputation.
improvements.strawBeds.name: Straw beds
improvements.woodenBeds.name: Wooden beds
improvements.woodenBeds.description: Provides better rest for assigned gladiators.
improvements.quietQuarters.name: Quiet quarters
improvements.quietQuarters.description: Reduces noise and supports morale recovery.
improvements.sparringRing.name: Sparring ring
improvements.advancedDoctoreTools.name: Advanced doctore tools
improvements.advancedDoctoreTools.descri: Improves training control and lowers injury risk.
policies.balancedTraining.name: Balanced training
policies.balancedTraining.description: Keeps drills broad across strength, agility and defense.
policies.strengthDoctrine.name: Strength doctrine
policies.agilityDoctrine.name: Agility doctrine
policies.agilityDoctrine.description: Focuses drills on footwork and agility.
policies.defensiveDoctrine.name: Defensive doctrine
policies.defensiveDoctrine.description: Focuses drills on defense and survival.
policies.brutalDiscipline.name: Brutal discipline
policies.brutalDiscipline.description: Pushes strength gains at a morale cost.
weeklyPlan.title: Weekly plan
weeklyPlan.manualDescription: Drag tasks onto workdays, tune their points, then validate only when every remaining day is complete.
weeklyPlan.dailyPlanDescription: Allocate the shared daily points for the whole ludus.
weeklyPlan.buckets.gladiatorDescription: {points} points per day from the current cohort.
weeklyPlan.emptyPalette: No tasks are available yet. Upgrade or unlock building skills to add new planning options.
weeklyPlan.staffBuildingManaged: Staff do not consume weekly points: they work through their assigned building.
weeklyPlan.sundayArenaNotice: Sunday is reserved for games and is not part of the work plan.
weeklyPlan.arenaDayDescription: No points to assign: the day is dedicated to arena combats.
weeklyPlan.finalReport.title: Week complete
weeklyPlan.reports.title: Recent reports
weeklyPlan.nextStep: Recruitment, planning and combat will build on this save foundation.
weeklyPlan.noGladiators: Recruit a gladiator to start weekly planning.
weeklyPlan.recommendations.morale: Recover morale before combat pressure rises.
weeklyPlan.recommendations.injury: Limit physical activity while the injury heals.
weeklyPlan.recommendations.balanced: Keep the shared weekly plan balanced.
finance.title: Finances
finance.description: Track weekly flows, ledger entries and loans from the ludus treasury.
finance.insufficientTreasuryForBuyout: The treasury is too low to buy out this loan.
finance.confirmLoan.title: Confirm loan
finance.confirmLoan.message: Take {loan} for {amount}? It will cost {payment} per week for {weeks} weeks.
finance.confirmBuyout.title: Confirm buyout
finance.loans.smallLoan.name: Small loan
finance.loans.smallLoan.description: Immediate cash with a modest weekly repayment.
finance.loans.businessLoan.name: Business loan
finance.loans.businessLoan.description: A larger loan for expanding the ludus economy.
finance.loans.patronLoan.name: Patron loan
finance.loans.patronLoan.description: A prestigious but expensive loan backed by political contacts.
staff.detailDescription: A {type} staff member supporting specialized ludus routines.
staff.noAssignment: This staff member is not assigned to a building.
staff.assignmentValidation.staffCandidat: This market candidate is no longer available.
staff.assignmentValidation.staffNotFound: This staff member is no longer available.
staff.assignmentValidation.buildingNotFo: This building is no longer available.
staff.assignmentValidation.invalidStaffT: This staff type cannot work here.
staff.assignmentValidation.noAvailableSt: The Domus staff limit is reached.
staff.assignmentValidation.notPurchased: Purchase this building before assigning staff.
staff.assignmentValidation.buildingDoesN: This building does not require staff.
staff.assignmentValidation.buildingFully: This building already has enough staff.
events.title: Event
events.noPending: No event needs a decision right now.
events.rebellionCrisis.title: Rebellion crisis
events.rebellionCrisis.description: The ludus reaches boiling point. The gladiators gather openly against the house, and the next order will decide whether the school survives intact.
events.rebellionCrisis.payForCalm.label: Pay for calm
events.rebellionCrisis.payForCalm.conseq: A costly payout lowers the rebellion and restores some happiness.
events.rebellionCrisis.repressRiot.label: Repress riot
events.rebellionCrisis.repressRiot.conse: Force restores order, but wounds happiness and reputation.
events.rebellionCrisis.freeGladiators.co: The crisis ends, but the fighters leave and the ludus must rebuild.
events.departureThreat.title: Departure threat
events.departureThreat.description: A gladiator demands a bonus in front of his peers and threatens to leave the ludus if his loyalty is not recognized. Your answer will weigh on both his pride and the house authority.
events.departureThreat.offerBonus.label: Offer a bonus
events.departureThreat.offerBonus.conseq: The bonus is costly, but the gladiator stays and feels valued.
events.departureThreat.refusePayment.con: You preserve the treasury, but his morale drops and he may leave the ludus.
events.trainingRefusal.title: Training refusal
events.trainingRefusal.description: A gladiator refuses the planned routine in front of his peers. The yard watches your response, and the ludus discipline may falter.
events.trainingRefusal.grantRest.label: Grant rest
events.trainingRefusal.strictDrill.label: Strict drill
events.trainingRefusal.strictDrill.conse: Discipline improves strength but hurts morale.
events.patricianVisit.title: Patrician visit
events.patricianVisit.description: A local patron asks for an immediate tour of the ludus. His favor could open doors, but a proper reception costs time and coin.
events.patricianVisit.hostVisit.label: Host visit
events.patricianVisit.hostVisit.conseque: The reception costs money but improves reputation.
events.patricianVisit.keepRoutine.label: Keep routine
events.patricianVisit.keepRoutine.conseq: The ludus stays focused, but the patron feels slighted.
events.rivalRumors.title: Rival rumors
events.rivalRumors.description: A rival lanista spreads ugly stories through the market, loudly enough for traders to repeat them. Your silence or answer will shape the ludus reputation.
events.rivalRumors.answerPublicly.label: Answer publicly
events.rivalRumors.answerPublicly.conseq: A public answer costs money but restores reputation.
events.rivalRumors.ignoreRumors.label: Ignore
events.youngPromise.title: Young promise
events.youngPromise.description: A gladiator shows a flash of talent during practice and draws every eye in the yard. Decide whether this becomes private coaching or a public example.
events.youngPromise.extraCoaching.label: Extra coaching
events.youngPromise.extraCoaching.conseq: Focused coaching improves agility but costs energy.
events.youngPromise.publicPraise.label: Public praise
events.youngPromise.publicPraise.consequ: Praise boosts morale and a little reputation.
events.badOmen.title: Bad omen
events.badOmen.description: A gladiator is shaken by a raven circling the yard. Superstition travels quickly through the dormitory if no one settles the matter.
events.badOmen.performRite.label: Perform rite
events.badOmen.performRite.consequence: A small rite eases the fear, but morale still suffers.
events.badOmen.dismissFear.label: Dismiss fear
events.badOmen.dismissFear.consequence: Ignoring the omen leaves the gladiator unsettled.
events.spoiledRations.title: Spoiled rations
events.spoiledRations.description: A bad sack of grain reaches the kitchen before anyone notices. The pots are already ready, and the men are waiting for their meal.
events.spoiledRations.replaceRations.con: The cost hurts, but morale only dips slightly.
events.spoiledRations.serveAnyway.label: Serve anyway
events.insultFromVeteran.title: Veteran's insult
events.insultFromVeteran.description: A veteran mocks a gladiator in front of the yard, turning a sharp remark into a spectacle. The ludus authority depends on your ruling.
events.insultFromVeteran.mediate.label: Mediate
events.insultFromVeteran.mediate.consequ: The slight is contained, but morale drops.
events.merchantGuildOffer.title: Merchant guild offer
events.merchantGuildOffer.description: A merchant guild proposes an exclusive supply arrangement while contract clerks are already negotiating terms. The payment is tempting, but smaller traders will remember being shut out.
events.merchantGuildOffer.acceptExclusiv: The guild pays well, but the ludus loses some goodwill among open-market traders.
events.merchantGuildOffer.keepOpenMarket: You refuse the quick coin and preserve the house's fair reputation.
events.fixedOddsWhisper.title: Fixed odds whisper
events.fixedOddsWhisper.description: A bettor claims the bookmaker's slate is being nudged before the odds are posted. The office can turn the rumor into profit or prove its books are clean.
events.fixedOddsWhisper.auditLedger.cons: The audit costs money, but steadies the office and protects the house name.
events.fixedOddsWhisper.rideRumor.label: Ride the rumor
events.fixedOddsWhisper.rideRumor.conseq: The rumor becomes quick coin, but trust and gate order suffer.
events.armyTrainingRequest.title: Army training request
events.armyTrainingRequest.description: A centurion asks your school to sharpen a few recruits before inspection. The coin is good, but the work steals focus from the gladiators.
events.armyTrainingRequest.drillSoldiers: The soldiers pay for the lesson, while a gladiator spends extra energy.
events.armyTrainingRequest.protectRoutin: The ludus keeps its rhythm, but the centurion is unimpressed.
events.festivalSponsorDemand.title: Festival sponsor demand
events.festivalSponsorDemand.description: A sponsor tries to reshape the public program on the morning of the games. Honoring him could make the spectacle shine, but it turns the event into his stage.
events.festivalSponsorDemand.honorSponso: The tribute costs money, but adds spectacle and public favor.
events.festivalSponsorDemand.protectProg: The games stay focused, though the sponsor leaves irritated.
events.patronToastDemand.title: Patron toast demand
events.patronToastDemand.description: A powerful guest turns the banquet toward a speech in his own honor. The table waits to see whether the house serves ambition or unity.
events.patronToastDemand.praisePatron.co: The patron rewards the praise, but the household bristles.
events.patronToastDemand.toastWholeHouse: The broader toast costs coin, but lifts the room and still earns favor.
events.surplusHarvest.title: Surplus harvest
events.surplusHarvest.description: The canteen prepares more than expected. Merchants are ready to buy, while the household would welcome better provisions.
events.surplusHarvest.sellSurplus.label: Sell surplus
events.surplusHarvest.feedLudus.label: Feed the ludus
events.surplusHarvest.feedLudus.conseque: A smaller sale still improves the house name.
events.workshopBreakthrough.title: Workshop breakthrough
events.workshopBreakthrough.description: The workshop staff discovers a faster way to finish useful gear. Merchants want the method, while the ludus could keep the advantage close.
events.workshopBreakthrough.keepTechniqu: The ludus earns less now, but its craft reputation improves.
events.toolTheft.title: Tool theft
events.toolTheft.description: Tools vanish from a productive building, slowing the week's work. Someone expects you to absorb the loss quietly.
events.toolTheft.investigate.label: Investigate
events.toolTheft.investigate.consequence: The inquiry costs money but protects the ludus reputation.
events.toolTheft.replaceTools.label: Replace tools
events.crackedBathhouse.title: Cracked bathhouse
events.crackedBathhouse.description: Maintenance crews find a spreading crack near the bathhouse channels. A full repair will be costly, but a cheap patch may sour the whole yard.
events.crackedBathhouse.repairNow.label: Repair now
events.crackedBathhouse.repairNow.conseq: Proper repairs cost coin and improve daily comfort.
events.crackedBathhouse.patchLater.label: Patch later
events.crackedBathhouse.patchLater.conse: A quick patch saves money, but morale suffers.
events.taxInspection.title: Tax inspection
events.taxInspection.description: An official arrives to inspect the ludus accounts. Clean books are cheaper than favors, but less useful.
events.taxInspection.presentLedger.label: Present ledger
events.taxInspection.presentLedger.conse: The official finds enough to demand a modest payment.
events.taxInspection.offerGift.label: Offer gift
events.taxInspection.offerGift.consequen: The gift is expensive, but buys a little favor.
events.creditorPressure.title: Creditor pressure
events.creditorPressure.description: Account clerks warn that creditors and tax runners are asking questions while the household mood is already thin. A tidy payment can quiet the books, but delay has a price.
events.creditorPressure.settleAccounts.c: Paying hard coin repairs trust and calms the household.
events.creditorPressure.stretchDebt.cons: A smaller payment keeps coin inside the ludus, but the delay hurts morale and reputation.
events.rivalPatronPoach.title: Rival patron poach
events.rivalPatronPoach.description: A rival lanista courts one of your best patrons during contract talks, promising cleaner training and louder applause. The patron waits to see how much the house values him.
events.rivalPatronPoach.counterOffer.con: A generous counter keeps the patron close and turns the rivalry into public prestige.
events.rivalPatronPoach.letPatronWalk.co: You keep the purse disciplined, but the rival claims the social victory.
events.cellblockConspiracy.title: Cellblock conspiracy
events.cellblockConspiracy.description: Coded whispers move through the sleeping quarters. The rebellion is not open yet, but the wrong order could teach every angry man who still has courage.
events.cellblockConspiracy.plantInforman: Paid informants expose the plot and restore control, though trust inside the ludus suffers.
Mercy eases the anger, but the softer hand weakens household authority.
events.masterworkCommission.title: Masterwork commission
events.masterworkCommission.description: A wealthy buyer asks the forge for arms fine enough to impress an entire legion staff. The commission can bring rich coin now or become a craft showcase.
events.masterworkCommission.rushShipment: The rushed order pays handsomely, but rough edges damage trust.
events.masterworkCommission.perfectCraft: Careful work pays less today, but raises the house name and reputation.
events.arenaPatronFeud.title: Arena patron feud
events.arenaPatronFeud.description: Two proud patrons claim the same arena honor before the next spectacle. The crowd will enjoy the tension, but the seating order can shape the ludus reputation.
events.arenaPatronFeud.splitSeats.label: Split seats
events.arenaPatronFeud.splitSeats.conseq: A balanced arrangement costs coin, but protects order and public respect.
events.arenaPatronFeud.favorFaction.cons: Favoring one faction brings immediate payment and spectacle, while the household absorbs the insult.
arena.title: Arena
arena.closedBody: The gates stay closed during the week. Combats open during the Sunday arena phase.
arena.noEligible: No gladiator is healthy enough to fight today.
arenaRoute.redirectBody: Arena day now plays in a dedicated view, without the ludus panels.
alerts.lowHealth.title: Low health
alerts.lowHealth.description: This gladiator should receive medical attention soon.
alerts.criticalHealth.title: Critical health
alerts.criticalHealth.description: This gladiator should avoid physical activities.
alerts.lowEnergy.title: Low energy
alerts.lowEnergy.description: This gladiator needs lighter duties or rest.
alerts.criticalEnergy.title: Critical energy
alerts.lowMorale.title: Low morale
alerts.criticalMorale.title: Critical morale
alerts.criticalMorale.description: This gladiator should recover morale before taking risks.
alerts.injury.title: Active injury
alerts.injury.description: This gladiator should avoid physical activity this week.
buildingSkills.domus.championship-bookin: Uses the Domus network to book prestigious arena opportunities.
buildingActivities.domus.profitForecasti: Uses maintenance points to recover hidden operating margin from the Domus.
buildingActivities.domus.championshipBoo: Uses contract points to arrange higher-profile opportunities through the Domus.
